channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: J’ai testé le Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro, il ne lui manque pas grand chose pour devenir une référence
item.description: Le Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro est un nouveau bracelet connecté commercialisé depuis fin mai. Nous l'avons porté au poignet durant deux semaines afin de vous livrer nos impressions.

item.title: Federal employees can download TikTok on their work phones again
item.description: The Department of Justice says that federal employees can now download TikTok on their government devices.

item.title: How does the Apple Watch water lock feature actually work?
item.description: The water lock feature on Apple Watches automatically activates when you're swimming, but what does it do?

item.title: Un forfait à 1,49 euro, un pour la 5G+ et un pour voyager, voici la sélection de la semaine
item.description: Trois forfaits se détachent cette semaine, chacun pensé pour un usage bien précis. Trois offres sans engagement, chacune la moins chère de sa catégorie.

item.title: GoPro’s discounted Max 2 bundle includes $100 worth of accessories
item.description: A 360-degree camera is a great way to ensure you capture every bit of the action, but prices tend to be on the high end for models worth your attention. That’s why it’s notable that the GoPro Max 2 accessory bundle is discounted to $369 at Amazon (a dollar more at Best Buy and GoPro). […]

item.title: A 600-mile road trip (and data) proves EV charging doesn’t suck anymore
item.description: A recent road trip in an EV revealed just how much faster and more reliable DC Fast charging has become in the U.S.

item.title: The Guardian’s Carter Sherman fondly remembers being terrified by Ocarina of Time
item.description: Carter Sherman has been covering sex, gender, and the complex personal and national politics that accompany them for years. She was a senior reporter for Vice and has written for Elle, Ms. magazine, and Los Angeles magazine as well. Along the way, she's garnered a Scripps Howard Award, a National Press Club Journalism Award, and […]

item.title: Apple is putting up prices on Apple Music and Apple One, and says 'rising licensing costs' are to blame — here's how much you'll pay now
item.description: Apple has put up the prices for its music streaming subscription service for the first time in four years.

item.title: The Odyssey sails towards a record-breaking opening weekend
item.description: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" is eyeing a $117 million opening weekend, the best for live-action films this year.
